allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\); print\('Title:', d.get\('title','ERROR'\)\); print\('Duration:', d.get\('duration','?'\), 'sec'\); print\('Platform:', d.get\('platform','?'\)\); print\('Formats:', len\(d.get\('formats',[]\)\), 'adet'\); [print\(f'  - {f[\\"quality\\"]} \({f[\\"ext\\"]}\) id={f[\\"id\\"]}'\) for f in d.get\('formats',[]\)[:5]]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Title:', d['title'][:50]\); print\('Formats:', len\(d['formats']\)\); print\('Platform:', d['platform']\)")
